title: JobOrderControl
description: OPC UA Machinery Job Management — JobOrderControl object. Instance of ISA-95 ISA95JobOrderReceiverObjectType (ns=2;i=1002). Exposes the job queue, available resources, and job lifecycle methods.

CurrentState.title: CurrentState
CurrentState.description: Current state of the job order state machine.

Value.description: Localized display name of the current state.

Id.description: NodeId of the current state node.

EquipmentID.description: Defines a read-only set of Equipment Class IDs and Equipment IDs that may be specified in a job order.

JobOrderList.description: Defines a read-only list of job order information available from the server.

MaterialClassID.description: Defines a read-only set of Material Classes IDs that may be specified in a job order.

MaterialDefinitionID.description: Defines a read-only set of Material Classes IDs that may be specified in a job order.

PersonnelID.description: Defines a read-only set of Personnel IDs and Person IDs that may be specified in a job order.

PhysicalAssetID.description: Defines a read-only set of Physical Asset Class IDs and Physical Asset IDs that may be specified in a job order.

WorkMaster.description: Defines a read-only set of work master IDs that may be specified in a job order, and the read-only set of parameters that may be specified for a specific work master.

Store.description: Stores a job order on the server without starting it (ISA-95 inherited).

CreationTime.description: Time the job order was stored.

StoreAndStart.description: Stores and immediately starts a job order (ISA-95 inherited).

JobOrder.description: The job order to store and start.

CreationTime.description: Time the job order was stored.

Start.description: Starts a previously stored job order (ISA-95 inherited).

JobOrderID.description: ID of the job order to start.

Update.description: Updates a stored or running job order (ISA-95 inherited).

Stop.description: Stops a running job order (ISA-95 inherited).

JobOrderID.description: ID of the job order to stop.

Abort.description: Aborts a stored or running job order (ISA-95 inherited).

JobOrderID.description: ID of the job order to abort.

Clear.description: Clears (removes) a stored job order that has not yet started (ISA-95 inherited).

JobOrderID.description: ID of the job order to clear.

ISA95JobOrderAndStateDataType.title: ISA95JobOrderAndStateDataType
ISA95JobOrderAndStateDataType.description: ISA95 job order with state info (ISA-95 V2). Full definition in ISA-95 JOBCONTROL V2 NodeSet.

ISA95WorkMasterDataType.title: ISA95WorkMasterDataType
ISA95WorkMasterDataType.description: ISA95 work master with parameters (ISA-95 V2). Full definition in ISA-95 JOBCONTROL V2 NodeSet.

ISA95JobOrderDataType.title: ISA95JobOrderDataType
ISA95JobOrderDataType.description: ISA-95 job order payload — WorkMasterId, parameters, personnel, equipment, material, and scheduling info. Full definition in ISA-95 JOBCONTROL V2 NodeSet.
